# Recommended regression tests. One pytest target per line.
# This file is read by the Recommended-Tests CI workflow on pull requests.
#
# Supported formats:
#   tests/e2e/pull_request/one_card/test_foo.py
#   tests/e2e/pull_request/one_card/test_foo.py::TestClass::test_method
#   tests/ut/attention/a2/test_attention_v1.py
